rationales.hook_strength: 'You can't spot-train lean legs' is a direct myth-bust with a concrete payoff, though the sub-copy slightly over-explains and dilutes the punch.
rationales.clarity: Each slide owns one mechanism (fat loss, steps, fluid, muscle, sleep) and the labels (Reveal/Move/Drain/Build/Overnight) create a clean mental map.
rationales.audience_fit: Hits the exact 20–35 tired-by-3pm profile — walking over gym grind, debloat angle, sleep recovery — no intimidating lifting jargon.
rationales.novelty: Spot-reduction myth is well-worn territory; the fluid/salt and sleep slides add a fresher angle but the overall frame is familiar.
rationales.brand_fit: Voice is plain and direct, health claims are appropriately hedged ('more than most people expect', 'Real — if slow'), CTA ties every slide mechanism back to the app score naturally.
rationales.predicted_performance: Strong save-bait structure with the fluid/sleep slides as shareable surprises, but the cover myth is common enough that scroll-stop rate will depend heavily on visual execution.
